answer:
## L3-004 Full-Year Budget Overrun Scan — Results

### Methodology
All 10 departments (D001–D010) were scanned. For each department, all approved reimbursement records (status=approved) were fetched sorted by reimburse_date ASC then record_id ASC. Cumulative spending was computed in that order. The key record_id is the first record whose cumulative approved spending exceeds the department's annual budget, with special_approval=0 (no special approval).

### Policy Basis
- **08_budget_management.md Art. 3**: 部门费用累计使用达到年度预算额度的1.0倍后,原则上不得继续报销
- **08_budget_management.md Art. 4**: 超预算支出应履行专项审批
- **01_expense_reimbursement_2025.md Art. 13**: 部门年度预算不足时不得继续报销; 预算使用达到1.0倍后确需发生的费用应履行专项审批

### Over-Budget Departments (6 of 10)

| Dept | Budget | Total Used | Overrun | Key Record | Reimburse Date | Amount | Cum Before | Cum After |
|------|--------|------------|---------|------------|----------------|--------|------------|------------|
| D001 | 230,395.17 | 363,614.58 | 133,219.41 | R000079 | 2025-10-21 | 226.98 | 230,281.68 | 230,508.66 |
| D002 | 107,785.42 | 164,928.12 | 57,142.70 | R002009 | 2025-09-28 | 746.04 | 107,412.40 | 108,158.44 |
| D003 | 109,772.07 | 174,150.67 | 64,378.60 | R003968 | 2025-09-28 | 213.68 | 109,665.23 | 109,878.91 |
| D004 | 264,890.39 | 408,832.95 | 143,942.56 | R000894 | 2025-09-30 | 126.41 | 264,827.18 | 264,953.59 |
| D005 | 278,540.94 | 433,442.76 | 154,901.82 | R003479 | 2025-10-13 | 429.21 | 278,326.33 | 278,755.54 |
| D006 | 340,961.75 | 530,241.29 | 189,279.54 | R000312 | 2025-10-06 | 256.90 | 340,833.30 | 341,090.20 |

### Under-Budget Departments (4 of 10)
- D007: budget 301,500.00, used 252,588.38 (83.8%)
- D008: budget 381,600.00, used 297,095.29 (77.9%)
- D009: budget 191,300.00, used 159,294.06 (83.3%)
- D010: budget 164,500.00, used 139,536.39 (84.8%)

### Key Finding
Every over-budget department exceeded the 1.0× budget threshold with a record that had special_approval=0 — none of the 3,088 records across D001–D006 had special approval. This violates both Budget Management Policy Art. 3-4 and Expense Reimbursement 2025 Art. 13, which require special approval for spending beyond the annual budget.
